prompts.prompt: Soft warm studio lighting on a contemporary low-profile modular corduroy sofa in muted earth tones — mocha brown, soft gray, dusty blue, sage green, or light blue-gray ribbed corduroy fabric. Clean white or warm off-white background with light wood floor. Minimal styling — one throw pillow, a knit blanket. Photography is product-centered, shot at 50mm f/2.8, slightly above eye level. Mood is calm, inviting, Israeli-modern — lived-in but curated. Brand colors: near-black #0e0e0e text, warm tan #d4ad84 accents, soft teal #97bcc5 highlights. Bold clean Hebrew sans-serif typography. Warm, approachable, quality-conscious. Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact product colors, typography style, and brand tone precisely. Create: a static ad with a warm off-white #e7e6e4 background. Top third: large bold sans-serif headline reading "הספה שמתאימה לחיים שלך". Below in smaller text: "מודולרית, קורדרוי איטלקי, 5 צבעים — טוסקנה מבית מילגה". Bottom half: Toscana modular corduroy sofa in mocha brown on light wood floor with a cream knit throw blanket draped over one arm. Shot at 50mm f/2.8 from slightly above. Milega logo bottom right. Clean, authoritative.
prompts.notes: Headline translates to 'The sofa that fits your life'. Subhead highlights modularity, corduroy, and 5 colors.

prompts.prompt:
Soft warm studio lighting on a contemporary low-profile modular corduroy sofa in muted earth tones — mocha brown, soft gray, dusty blue, sage green, or light blue-gray ribbed corduroy fabric. Clean white or warm off-white background with light wood floor. Minimal styling — one throw pillow, a knit blanket. Photography is product-centered, shot at 50mm f/2.8, slightly above eye level. Mood is calm, inviting, Israeli-modern — lived-in but curated. Brand colors: near-black #0e0e0e text, warm tan #d4ad84 accents, soft teal #97bcc5 highlights. Bold clean Hebrew sans-serif typography. Warm, approachable, quality-conscious. Use the attached images as brand reference. Match exact brand typography style and tone. Create: a copy-dominant manifesto ad on a clean white background. No background imagery — text is the entire creative. Top: oversized bold black sans-serif headline reading "היא לא הכי זולה." spanning the top 15%. Below: right-aligned Hebrew body copy in smaller regular-weight black text, structured as short punchy sentences and line breaks: "אפשר למצוא ספה יותר זולה.
אבל לא בקורדרוי איטלקי.
לא עם ספוג שלא קורס אחרי שנה.
לא מודולרית — שאפשר לפרק ולהרכיב מחדש.
לא עם 5 צבעים שבאמת נראים טוב בסלון.
לא עם אופציית Mix & Match.
לא עם משלוח חינם.
ולא מייצור ישראלי עם 30 שנה של ניסיון.
היא לא הכי זולה.
היא הכי שווה.
טוסקנה, מבית מילגה.". Bottom 20%: Toscana triple sofa in mocha brown corduroy centered, product-only on white, clean studio shot angle. No icons, no badges, no CTA button. The writing IS the ad.
prompts.notes: Headline: She's not the cheapest. Manifesto builds the case for why Toscana is worth it — corduroy, foam, modularity, colors, mix & match, free shipping, Israeli made.

Warm, approachable, quality-conscious. Use the attached images as brand reference for product color and packaging ONLY. Do NOT use ad layouts or polish. This must look like a real person's Instagram Story. Create: a casual iPhone photo of a woman's hand with clean natural nails running her fingers across the ribbed mocha brown corduroy fabric of a Toscana sofa module, at a slight angle over a light wood floor with a cream knit throw visible in the background. Natural overhead daylight, slightly warm, iPhone 15 quality. Scattered across the frame: 5 text bubbles using Instagram Story's built-in highlighted text tool. Each bubble must have a highlighted background for readability, with varied highlight colors between bubbles. Bubble 1: "ספה חדשה 🛋️" large and bold. Bubble 2: "הקורדרוי הזה מרגיש כמו קטיפה רק יותר טוב". Bubble 3: "היא מודולרית! אפשר לשנות סידור בכל רגע 🤯". Bubble 4: "שבוע ראשון ואני כבר לא קמה ממנה 😍". Bubble 5: "מילגה עשו את זה.". Should feel casual and hand-placed, not designed.
prompts.notes: Instagram Story style. Bubbles: new sofa, corduroy feels amazing, it's modular, can't get up after first week, Milega nailed it.

prompts.prompt: Soft warm studio lighting on a contemporary low-profile modular corduroy sofa in muted earth tones — mocha brown, soft gray, dusty blue, sage green, or light blue-gray ribbed corduroy fabric. Clean white or warm off-white background with light wood floor. Minimal styling — one throw pillow, a knit blanket. Photography is product-centered, shot at 50mm f/2.8, slightly above eye level. Mood is calm, inviting, Israeli-modern — lived-in but curated. Brand colors: near-black #0e0e0e text, warm tan #d4ad84 accents, soft teal #97bcc5 highlights. Bold clean Hebrew sans-serif typography. Warm, approachable, quality-conscious. Use the attached images as brand reference. Match the exact Toscana modular corduroy sofa — low-profile boxy-soft silhouette, ribbed corduroy texture in mocha brown, clean contemporary lines precisely. Create: a lifestyle product photo set in a warm Israeli living room with soft natural daylight from a nearby window and a naturally blurred background showing light wood shelves and a green houseplant. Frame is very slightly off-center — product not perfectly centered, right edge of sofa very slightly cropped — feels found rather than composed. Slight natural sensor grain consistent with a phone camera in indoor daylight. Subtle natural vignette at frame corners. Center of frame, large and dominant: Toscana double modular sofa in mocha brown corduroy with ribbed texture clearly visible, one cream throw pillow on the left seat and a knit blanket draped over the right arm, sitting on a light wood floor, slightly angled toward the viewer. A few scattered throw pillow tassels on the floor around the base for casual realism. Stuck directly onto the front seat cushion of the sofa: a yellow square post-it note, slightly crooked and not perfectly straight — slightly trapezoid from the angle it was pressed on. Realistic paper texture with a horizontal crease across the middle as if it was folded once. Subtle curl at bottom-right corner only. Held at the top by a small piece of clear tape, slightly wrinkled. One word in the handwriting is slightly heavier-inked. Handwritten in thick black marker-style lettering, imperfect and uneven, lowercase Hebrew natural writing: "ישבתי עליה" line break "ולא קמתי" line break "שלוש שעות" line break "🤷‍♀️" No attribution line. No signature. Bottom center of frame, outside the photo on a plain white strip: small plain lowercase sans-serif caption text: "milega.co.il — הספה שלא קמים ממנה". No logo overlay anywhere in the frame. Brand identity carried entirely by the product visible in the photo. No border. Warm, casual, authentic.
prompts.notes: Post-it note reads: I sat on it / and didn't get up / three hours / 🤷‍♀️. Caption: milega.co.il — the sofa you don't get up from.
